title: Banilla Hammers
description: A mod that adds vanilla-styled hammers with special attack!
body: **A mod that adds vanilla-styled hammers with special attack** **New special attack gives new stun effect** (it disables damage and movement) **Plants can be harvested with a special attack 0_о** **Different hammers and mod support!** **The hammer has high damage, low speed, special attack and attack range +1** **ඞ**
